_comment_name: Output zip basename + staged folder name (no spaces)
name: MyToolName
_comment_brand: Display brand for the new repo (used in HTML titles, manifest, deploy script)
description: Short description shown in README of generated zip
_comment_tools: List of tool function names from AIAgent/app/api.py TOOL_SCHEMAS. Determines which engine modules are included.
_comment_pages: List of HTML files under webapp/ to ship
